reviews.comment:
La atención de los empleados es muy buena pero la comida te la sirven fria, no te dan pan
Tenes que pedir sal y aderezos
En eso fallan siempre.

(Translated by Google)
The staff is very attentive, but the food is served cold and they don't give you bread.
You have to ask for salt and dressings.
That's where they always fail.

reviews.comment:
